title: ReforgedVanilla
description: This resource pack aims to have improved textures with the same vanilla feel. It contains things like 3d items, unique block models, and varied textures.
body:
Reforged Vanilla is a resource pack that aims to refresh the look of Minecraft while keeping the vanilla feel. It has features ranging from 3d items to texture variations. If you feel tired of the vanilla textures, this pack would be perfect for a unique but familiar style.

It does not require but is improved by having the mods **Polytone** and **Continuity** installed.

![a Mineshaft scene with stone, andesite, deepslate, and oak supports with a torch in the background and an iron pickaxe, water bucket, coal, and iron ore in the foreground.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CTh3WRJM/images/7388f42d967194622463b45352ade5fa909df611.png)

Join the Discord server! https://discord.gg/27wUtEJh25
